x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert correlation rules define how Now Assist groups related alerts into meaningful events. Without configured rules, Now Assist cannot perform AI-assisted event grouping or reduce alert noise.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source and CI class. Correlation rules are a prerequisite for meaningful Now Assist ITOM AI-assisted event grouping.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert correlation rules define how Now Assist groups related alerts into meaningful events. Without configured rules, Now Assist cannot perform AI-assisted event grouping or reduce alert noise.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Active Correlation Rules</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('em_alert_correlation_rule');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active alert correlation rules';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active correlation rules. Now Assist ITOM has the foundation for AI-assisted event grouping across key infrastructure types.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active correlation rule(s) (target: 5+). Limited correlation coverage reduces the scope of Now Assist ITOM AI-assisted event grouping.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active alert correlation rules. Correlation rules are a prerequisite for Now Assist ITOM AI-assisted event grouping — without them all alerts are treated as isolated events.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005987</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source and CI class. Correlation rules are a prerequisite for meaningful Now Assist ITOM AI-assisted event grouping.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4c</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
